yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_CVE202633678__Vikunja_has_IDOR_in_Task_A {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-33678 - Vikunja has IDOR in Task Attachment ReadOne Allows Cross-Projec"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-24"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-33678" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "ReadOne" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

        any of them
}

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for GSocket Backdoor Delivered Through Bash Script, (Fri, Mar 20th)"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-24"
    strings:

}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-33678 - Vikunja has IDOR in Task Attachment ReadOne"; content:"CVE-2026-33678"; nocase; sid:9701645; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-33680 - Vikunja Vulnerable to Link Share Hash Discl"; content:"CVE-2026-33680"; nocase; sid:4086820; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31381, CVE-2026-31382: Gainsight Assist Information"; content:"CVE-2026-31381"; nocase; sid:3583250; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Breaking the Sound Barrier, Part II: Exploiting CVE-2024-545"; content:"CVE-2024-54529"; nocase; sid:3648300; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 100 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 43 as HIGH risk. 21 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Address 21 CISA KEV-listed vulnerabilities under active exploitation
Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
